entities.name: Vrijen Attawar
entities.context: Founder of Careerspan, career coach turned tech entrepreneur

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company, envisioned as best-in-class reflection-based career product and potential acquisition target

entities.name: Reflection-Based Career Product
entities.context: Core product philosophy for Careerspan — using reflection and AI to empower candidates

entities.name: Empowering Under-Advocating Candidates
entities.context: V's motivation to help technically strong but less self-promotional people through reflection and AI

entities.name: Intellectually Interesting Work
entities.context: V deeply values novel, stimulating work; bored by repetitive patterns once mastered

entities.name: Rookie Financial Mistakes
entities.context: Fear of tax oversights on invoices, over-engineering systems too early

entities.name: Non-Technical Founder Scar Tissue
entities.context: Emotional residue from early years being 'kicked in the teeth' as a non-technical founder in tech

entities.name: Battle-Tested Founder Advice
entities.context: V seeks practical, proven advice from respected founders rather than abstract theory

entities.name: Emotional Cost of Layoffs
entities.context: V is sensitive to harming or disappointing people he likes; genuine concern about layoffs

relationships.context: Founder and primary operator of Careerspan
Deeply values stimulating work; loses motivation with repetitive coaching patterns
Core motivation — helping technically strong but under-promoted people
Product vision: best-in-class reflection-based career tool, valuable as acquisition target
Prefers practical wisdom from respected founders over abstract theory
Active fear — tax oversights, premature over-engineering
Formative negative experiences as non-technical founder in tech ecosystem
Genuinely does not want to harm or disappoint people he likes
